steps.title: Find the peak
steps.content: The graph models an object launched upward, so the height increases until the vertex and then decreases. The graph shows the peak at $x=2$.

steps.title: Pick the rising interval
steps.content: The height is increasing for the entire interval only when the interval stays before or reaches the peak without going past it. The interval from $x=0$ to $x=2$ does that. The answer is A.
